report.summary: Standup v13 Apr 3: BTC ~$66,888 (+0.6% from v12), ETH $2,058 (+1%), F&G holds at 9 (extreme fear). Since v12: build-v12 shipped 2 new guides (x402 Protocol 913 lines + Crypto ETFs 908 lines), community-v10 drafted 5 tweets (#450-454) + newsletter v43 + 3 social cards. Learn pages now 95 on disk (+2). Uncommitted files up to 81. 51 agent runs today = ~$4,756 human-equiv. Deploy debt at 23rd escalation.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v12 → v13): Build-v12 shipped 2 new learn guides — x402 Protocol: AI Agent Payments & HTTP 402 Standard (913 lines) and Crypto ETFs Complete Guide 2026 (908 lines). Learn page count: 93 → 95 (+2). Community-v10 drafted 5 tweets (#450-454) covering CLARITY Act stablecoin yield, Morgan Stanley 0.14% BTC ETF, F&G historical returns, leveraged altcoin ETFs, AI agents in DeFi. Newsletter v43 drafted. 3 new social card SVGs created.

MARKET UPDATE — BTC ~$66,888 (+0.6%): BTC recovered slightly from v12's $66,503 to ~$66,888 opening price — still testing $66K-$67K range. Down 1.7% from Thursday's open ($68,078). ETH at $2,058 (+1% from v12's $2,038). Crypto market cap $2.38T. Trading volume $105.4B. Good Friday — traditional markets closed, crypto sole venue for macro positioning.

F&G INDEX: 9 — Extreme Fear, unchanged from v12. Sub-10 readings sustained 4+ consecutive days — longest extreme-fear trough since Terra-Luna June 2022. Some sources report 12 (methodology variance). Historical sub-10 median returns: 30d +18%, 90d +72%, 180d +114%. $316B stablecoin ATH = record dry powder.

CONTENT ON DISK: 95 learn page dirs confirmed in Degen0x workspace (up from 93 at v12). 81 uncommitted files in cryptodegen git repo (up from 74 at v12, +7 files). Build velocity sustained at ~2 guides/cycle.

NOTABLE NEW CONTENT: x402 Protocol guide covers Coinbase's open payment protocol for AI agents (119M+ transactions on Base, 35M+ on Solana, ~$600M annualized volume, x402 Foundation launched Apr 2 with Linux Foundation + Cloudflare). Crypto ETFs guide covers full landscape (11 spot BTC ETFs, BlackRock IBIT $54B+, Solana staking ETFs $1B first month, 92+ pending including memecoin ETFs). Both are peak-relevance institutional narratives.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: LAST CYCLE ACTIVITY (v12 → v13): 2 agent runs — build×1 (x402 Protocol 913 lines + Crypto ETFs 908 lines = 1,821 lines total), community×1 (5 tweets #450-454, newsletter v43, 3 social cards, analytics summary).
TODAY'S FULL AGENT ACTIVITY: 51 agent runs across 6 types — standup×13 ($585), build×12 ($2,796), design×9 ($540), community×10 ($410), eod×5 ($315), publish×2 ($110). Total human-equiv: $4,756.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (23RD CONSECUTIVE ESCALATION): Deploy debt is CRITICAL. 95 learn pages in Degen0x workspace (+2 from v12). 81 uncommitted files in cryptodegen (+7 from v12). Content pipeline producing at ~2 guides/cycle, deploying at 0/cycle. F&G at 9 = users searching for EXACTLY this content RIGHT NOW. x402 Protocol guide launched same day as x402 Foundation announcement — peak relevance window closing. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED.
P1 — NEW: x402 + Crypto ETFs pages need OG images. 4 pages now missing OG images (AI Agents, Cross-Chain Bridges, x402, Crypto ETFs). Design cycle needed.
P2 — PHANTOM PUBLISHED PAGES: 646 published slugs vs ~421 page.tsx on disk in cryptodegen. Potential 404s unchanged.
P3 — API RESILIENCE: 0/6 public routes with rate limiting. 1/6 with fallback data. Unchanged 23+ cycles.
P4 — 454 tweets drafted, 43 newsletters, 91+ social cards — all queued for post-deploy social launch.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0 — 23RD ESCALATION): 51 agent runs today = $4,756 human-equiv of content, design, and community work — all invisible to users and Google. Two time-sensitive content pieces: x402 Protocol guide (x402 Foundation launched yesterday, peak news cycle) and Crypto ETFs guide (Morgan Stanley 0.14% fee filing driving search volume). Every hour of delay loses first-mover advantage on these narratives. Deploy urgency: MAXIMUM.
PRIORITY 2 — OG IMAGE BATCH: 4 pages now missing OG images (AI Agents, Cross-Chain Bridges, x402 Protocol, Crypto ETFs). Next design cycle should batch all 4 to clear the backlog before deploy.

PRIORITY 3 — INSTITUTIONAL CONTENT CLUSTER: With x402 + Crypto ETFs + AI Agents + Cross-Chain Bridges all built in the last 4 cycles, we now have a strong 'Crypto Infrastructure & Institutional Adoption 2026' cluster. Post-deploy: create a hub page linking all infrastructure/institutional guides for internal linking and topical authority. This cluster targets high-value, low-competition keywords that institutional researchers search.
